title: Bitter Crispy Irish Pistachio Grilled Dish
description: This show-off dish combines bitter flavors with a crispy texture and features unsalted pistachios for a low-carb-friendly and gourmet twist on traditional grilled dishes.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat. Lightly brush the pistachios with olive oil.
Combine salt, lemon juice, garlic powder, and unsweetened cocoa powder in a small bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
Place the pistachio on the preheated grill for about 2-3 minutes on each side, or until slightly charred and crispy. Watch carefully to avoid burning.
While grilling, whisk together the salt mixture into a smooth paste with a fork.
Once the pistachios are done grilling, spread them evenly over a plate. Sprinkle the salt mixture over the top of the pistachios. Allow it to sit for 1-2 minutes so that the flavors meld together.
Serve immediately as a side dish or use as an appetizer with a dip like hummus.
